flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bates College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.1k → $66.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bates College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.1k → $66.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bates College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.7k → $14.3k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bates College are 54% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($69.5k vs $45.0k).
